headlines.summary: During the first three months of the year, Trump purchased between $630,000 and $247,008 worth of Palantir stock and sold at least $1.1 million.

headlines.summary: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

headlines.title: Berkshire Hathaway returns to airlines with $2.6 billion stake in Delta Air Lines

headlines.summary: A rare strain of Ebola virus likely caused 80 deaths in Congo and Uganda, prompting the World Health Organization to declare a public health emergency.

headlines.title: These hidden forces are driving the runaway stock-market rally

candidates.thesis: NVIDIA is a leader in AI and compute infrastructure, benefiting from secular growth trends in machine learning, data centers, and autonomous systems. Strong fundamentals and a reasonable RSI make it a high-conviction long-term play.

Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing is the backbone of the global semiconductor industry, critical for AI and compute infrastructure. Strong fundamentals and proximity to SMA50 make it a solid long-term candidate.
ASML is the global leader in lithography systems, essential for advanced semiconductor manufacturing. It is well-positioned to benefit from secular growth in technology and AI demand.

NextEra Energy is a leader in clean energy, particularly renewable power generation. It aligns with the client's clean energy theme and offers long-term growth potential in the transition to sustainable energy.
Broadcom is a diversified semiconductor company with exposure to AI, 5G, and cloud infrastructure. Its strong fundamentals and proximity to SMA50 make it a compelling long-term investment.
